### Products
Discover how you can use quantum computing today

    * [ Cloud Platform  The Leap™ quantum cloud service provides real-time quantum access  ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/solutions-and-products/cloud-platform/)
    * [ Software & Tools  The Ocean™ suite of open-source tools are accessible via the Ocean SDK for rapid quantum development  ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/solutions-and-products/ocean/)

CAREERS
#  Join the Global Leader in Quantum Computing 
Our mission is to unlock the power of quantum computing for the world. Be part of the team that does that.
[ See All Open Jobs ](https://ats.rippling.com/d-wave-quantum/jobs)
Employee-Driven Recognition
## D-Wave Earns 2026   
Great Place To Work Certification™
The recognition is based entirely on employee feedback and reflects the strength of D-Wave’s culture during a period of rapid growth and innovation, as we continue to expand the team advancing the commercialization of quantum computing.
[ Read Press Release ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/company/newsroom/press-release/d-wave-certified-as-a-great-place-to-work-company/)
![Generic Processor Chip](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/gtobnc2w/1254770264.jpg)
![GPTW Site Hero 2000X2000](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/wtilkegc/gptw_site-hero_2000x2000.jpg)
Previous
![Marcela Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/rx2agf1h/marcela_careers_carousel.png)
IMPACT
### “I really like the people I work with and the product we build. I feel like I am an important part of it, even though I do a very small thing.”
Marcela — Senior Electronic Production Assembler. Team member since 2014.
![Mana Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/gkspeevs/mana_careers_carousel.png)
Diverse & Inclusive Culture
### “Working in a high-tech dynamic company which is developing the future technology with its friendly, super intelligent, passionate, hardworking and diverse people who appreciate questions, ideas, and teamwork is something that anybody would dream about.”
Mana — Staff Materials Scientist. Team member since 2018.
![Craig Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/qv4mripc/craig_careers_carousel.png)
Work-Life Balance
### “It is amazing to work in an environment with wonderful coworkers, where the work is inspiring and you have the flexibility to get your work done and take care of life's other challenges when they come up.”
Craig — VP of Hardware Systems and Service. Team member since 2007.
![Alex Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/jvnfhvug/alex_careers_carousel.png)
Opportunity for Growth
### “Working in such a collaborative environment has been a great way for me to build relationships and gain exposure and insight into what different teams work on. I received a lot of support and encouragement to develop skills that interest me.”
Alex — Staff Solutions Architect. Team member since 2019.
![Kelly Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/mejfg51k/kelly_careers_carousel.png)
Unique Career Opportunity
### “You don’t really go into a pure math degree thinking you’re going to get a job in industry, but here I am doing what I love, using talents I never expected to use in a professional setting.”
Kelly — Principal Architecture Researcher. Team member since 2015.
![Marcela Careers Carousel](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/rx2agf1h/marcela_careers_carousel.png)

TEAM
## Meet Our Diverse Teams
"I love the focus we bring to problem solving and technology development. We have a clear goal and a committed collaborative team all working toward that goal."
**Trevor — Chief Development Officer**
_Team member since 2008_
  * #### Research & Development
Work with talented scientists and engineers building the next generation of quantum computing systems.
  * #### Software Engineering
Solve real world problems with hybrid and quantum computing in the areas of applications, hybrid algorithms, optimization, cloud services, and open-source tools.
  * #### Sales & Marketing
Help to establish an entirely new global quantum computing market with our marketing, public affairs, and sales teams.
  * #### Business Services
Strategically partner with our multinational teams to drive business success.


![Texture 6 850X850 \(1\)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/lsogqhkp/texture_6_850x850.jpg)
![Employees 850X850](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/tplhswm0/employees_850x850.jpg)
INTERNSHIP
## Grow Your Career With   
D-Wave  

Whether you are a current student or a recent graduate, D-Wave offers internships and co-op opportunities that will help you grow your career. If you are interested in an internship or co-op opportunity at D-Wave, please visit our career site and apply under “Expression of Interest (Co-Ops and Internships)”.
[ Apply Here ](https://ats.rippling.com/d-wave-quantum/jobs)
![Texture 4 850X850 \(1\)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/amcih4lg/texture_4_850x850.jpg)
![Careers Culture1](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/mbolpxva/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_3.jpg)
BENEFITS & PERKS
## Live Your Best Life at Work and at Home
#### Healthy Work-Life Balance
We encourage vacations and support flex-schedules that enable our employees and their families to have a healthy work-life balance.
#### Impactful Work
Work on a variety of projects end-to-end where your voice matters and has a direct impact on our company and customer success.
#### Competitive Benefits Package
Our benefits package includes 100% premium coverage, competitive paid time off, sick time, holiday, stock options, short and long term disability, 401k, and more.
#### Career Growth & Continual Learning
We are a team of educators and learners where continued learning is highly encouraged.
#### Presenting, Publishing, & Patents Encouraged
Showcase your innovative work and shape the future of quantum computing through publications, patents, and speaking engagements.
#### Social Events
Enjoy a variety of virtual and onsite events such as lunch and learns, wellness programs, charity events, and trivia nights.
#### Established, Growing Start-Up Environment 
Join a creative, fast-paced start-up established in 1999.
#### Dog-Friendly Office
Bring your best friend to work at our dog-friendly office in Burnaby, British Columbia.
[![image](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/boqn1onj/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_7.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&rnd=132956524093430000&width=1000&upscale=false&quality=80)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/boqn1onj/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_7.jpg) ### [ “I am very impressed with how when someone comes up with an idea or comes up with something, and people say ‘we should try that’, months later we’re building it and we’re testing it. That keeps happening and keeps impressing me, over and over.” ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/boqn1onj/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_7.jpg)
[![image2](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/4mfm0xoq/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_5.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&rnd=132956524041070000&width=1000&upscale=false&quality=80)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/4mfm0xoq/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_5.jpg) ### ["People always ask about the culture at D-Wave, and I always tell them that folks are so passionate about their work and so curious, which creates an amazing culture of teachers and learners, and an awesome 'growth mindset' environment." ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/4mfm0xoq/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_5.jpg)
[![image3](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/xjwjvv5y/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_4.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&rnd=132956524107030000&width=1000&upscale=false&quality=80)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/xjwjvv5y/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_4.jpg) ### [“The project itself is very interesting and exciting. It is both scientific and technological. Moreover, a large collaborative work like this, with high dedication and different expertise is very rare in most places.” ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/xjwjvv5y/dwave_website_career_images_850x850_4.jpg)
[![image4](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/l1ob1wcm/careers_advantage_850x850.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&rnd=132956524107500000&width=1000&upscale=false&quality=80)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/l1ob1wcm/careers_advantage_850x850.jpg) ### ["Suddenly I had an opportunity to combine difficult mathematics with a concrete goal: developing a completely new type of computer. So I took it." ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/l1ob1wcm/careers_advantage_850x850.jpg)
## Want to Know More? Explore Our Job Seeker Resources
#### A History of Success
Founded in 1999, D-Wave is the leader in the development and delivery of quantum computing systems, software, and services and is the world’s first commercial supplier of quantum computers.
[Learn More ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/company/about-d-wave/)
#### Resource Library
Find out how D-Wave's quantum technology works, how to start building quantum applications, and how organizations have used quantum computing to solve their business problems.
[Explore Resources ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/learn/resource-library/)
#### Quantum Technology
We offer a cloud-based, full-stack of systems, software, developer tools, and services that enable organizations to build real applications using the power of quantum computing.
[Discover Our Products ](https://www.dwavequantum.com/solutions-and-products/product-overview/)
#### Take the Leap
The Leap quantum cloud service delivers real-time access to the Advantage quantum computer and hybrid solver services. Register for a free Leap account and try it out for yourself today.
[Sign Up for Leap ](https://cloud.dwavesys.com/leap/signup/)
![](https://www.dwavequantum.com/images/dwave_dots-1.svg)
## Ready to Join Our Team?
As the leader in commercializing quantum computing, our teams work hard to radically change what is possible every day. If you are curious, driven, and love to see the impact of your work in areas that really matter, then join us today!
[See All Open Jobs ](https://ats.rippling.com/d-wave-quantum/jobs)
[![](https://www.dwavequantum.com/images/English-D_Wave_US_English_2026_Certification_Badge.png)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/company/careers/) [![](https://www.dwavequantum.com/images/A-LIGN-SOC-Badge.png)](https://www.aicpa.org/soc4so)
![Footer Logo](https://www.dwavequantum.com/media/j31olsrx/d-wave-corporate-logo-full-color-light.png)

Employee-Driven Recognition

D-Wave Earns 2026
Great Place To Work Certification™

The recognition is based entirely on employee feedback and reflects the strength of D-Wave’s culture during a period of rapid growth and innovation, as we continue to expand the team advancing the commercialization of quantum computing.

IMPACT

“I really like the people I work with and the product we build. I feel like I am an important part of it, even though I do a very small thing.”

Marcela — Senior Electronic Production Assembler. Team member since 2014.

Diverse & Inclusive Culture

“Working in a high-tech dynamic company which is developing the future technology with its friendly, super intelligent, passionate, hardworking and diverse people who appreciate questions, ideas, and teamwork is something that anybody would dream about.”

Mana — Staff Materials Scientist. Team member since 2018.

Work-Life Balance

“It is amazing to work in an environment with wonderful coworkers, where the work is inspiring and you have the flexibility to get your work done and take care of life's other challenges when they come up.”

Craig — VP of Hardware Systems and Service. Team member since 2007.

Opportunity for Growth

“Working in such a collaborative environment has been a great way for me to build relationships and gain exposure and insight into what different teams work on. I received a lot of support and encouragement to develop skills that interest me.”

Alex — Staff Solutions Architect. Team member since 2019.

Unique Career Opportunity

“You don’t really go into a pure math degree thinking you’re going to get a job in industry, but here I am doing what I love, using talents I never expected to use in a professional setting.”

Kelly — Principal Architecture Researcher. Team member since 2015.

TEAM

Meet Our Diverse Teams

"I love the focus we bring to problem solving and technology development. We have a clear goal and a committed collaborative team all working toward that goal."

Trevor — Chief Development Officer

Team member since 2008

  • Research & Development

    Work with talented scientists and engineers building the next generation of quantum computing systems.

  • Software Engineering

    Solve real world problems with hybrid and quantum computing in the areas of applications, hybrid algorithms, optimization, cloud services, and open-source tools.

  • Sales & Marketing

    Help to establish an entirely new global quantum computing market with our marketing, public affairs, and sales teams.

  • Business Services

    Strategically partner with our multinational teams to drive business success.

INTERNSHIP

Grow Your Career With
D-Wave

Whether you are a current student or a recent graduate, D-Wave offers internships and co-op opportunities that will help you grow your career. If you are interested in an internship or co-op opportunity at D-Wave, please visit our career site and apply under “Expression of Interest (Co-Ops and Internships)”.

Apply Here
BENEFITS & PERKS

Live Your Best Life at Work and at Home

Healthy Work-Life Balance

We encourage vacations and support flex-schedules that enable our employees and their families to have a healthy work-life balance.

Impactful Work

Work on a variety of projects end-to-end where your voice matters and has a direct impact on our company and customer success.

Competitive Benefits Package

Our benefits package includes 100% premium coverage, competitive paid time off, sick time, holiday, stock options, short and long term disability, 401k, and more.

Career Growth & Continual Learning

We are a team of educators and learners where continued learning is highly encouraged.

Presenting, Publishing, & Patents Encouraged

Showcase your innovative work and shape the future of quantum computing through publications, patents, and speaking engagements.

Social Events

Enjoy a variety of virtual and onsite events such as lunch and learns, wellness programs, charity events, and trivia nights.

Established, Growing Start-Up Environment

Join a creative, fast-paced start-up established in 1999.

Dog-Friendly Office

Bring your best friend to work at our dog-friendly office in Burnaby, British Columbia.

“I am very impressed with how when someone comes up with an idea or comes up with something, and people say ‘we should try that’, months later we’re building it and we’re testing it. That keeps happening and keeps impressing me, over and over.”

"People always ask about the culture at D-Wave, and I always tell them that folks are so passionate about their work and so curious, which creates an amazing culture of teachers and learners, and an awesome 'growth mindset' environment."

“The project itself is very interesting and exciting. It is both scientific and technological. Moreover, a large collaborative work like this, with high dedication and different expertise is very rare in most places.”

"Suddenly I had an opportunity to combine difficult mathematics with a concrete goal: developing a completely new type of computer. So I took it."

A History of Success

Founded in 1999, D-Wave is the leader in the development and delivery of quantum computing systems, software, and services and is the world’s first commercial supplier of quantum computers.

Learn More

Resource Library

Find out how D-Wave's quantum technology works, how to start building quantum applications, and how organizations have used quantum computing to solve their business problems.

Explore Resources

Quantum Technology

We offer a cloud-based, full-stack of systems, software, developer tools, and services that enable organizations to build real applications using the power of quantum computing.

Discover Our Products

Take the Leap

The Leap quantum cloud service delivers real-time access to the Advantage quantum computer and hybrid solver services. Register for a free Leap account and try it out for yourself today.

As the leader in commercializing quantum computing, our teams work hard to radically change what is possible every day. If you are curious, driven, and love to see the impact of your work in areas that really matter, then join us today!
